Barnacle Linguine is a Crock Pot recipe exclusive to Don't Starve Together introduced in Return of Them. It is made of 2 Barnacles or Cooked Barnacles and at least 2.0 Vegetable.

–Wilson

–Willow

–Wolfgang
“I like my noodles plain, with butter.”
–Wendy
“ALL MINE”
–WX-78
“Oh my, it's very rich.”
–Wickerbottom
“Sorry, I'm eatin' this whole thing myself.”
–Woodie
“It's surprisingly delicious.”
–Maxwell
“It slays my hunger söundly!”
–Wigfrid
“Watch how fast we can slurp it up!”
–Webber
“Delectable!”
–Warly
“Strings of belly stuff”
–Wormwood
“Nothin' like a pot full of pasta.”
–Winona
“Oodles of fishy noodles.”
–Wortox
“Nuh-uh, not eating that.”
–Wurt
“Just about anything tastes good with pasta.”
–Walter
“That should keep me fed for a good while.”
–Wanda

'''Barnacle Linguine''' is a [[Crock Pot]] recipe exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'' introduced in ''[[Return of Them]]''. It is made of 2 [[Barnacles]] or [[Cooked Barnacles]] and at least 2.0 [[Vegetables|Vegetable]].

== {{pic|32|Cookbook}} Recipe ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Barnacle
|count1 = 2
|item2 = Vegetables
|comparator2 = ×
|count2= 2.0
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Barnacle Linguine
}}

== {{pic|32|Crock Pot}} Examples ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Barnacles
|count1 = 2
|item2 = Carrot
|count2= 2
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Barnacle Linguine
}}
{{Recipe

|count1 = 2
|item2 = Ripe Stone Fruit
|count2= 2
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Barnacle Linguine
}}

== {{Pic|32|Placeholder}}Trivia ==
* Barnacle Linguine was introduced in the ''[[Return of Them#Troubled Waters|Troubled Waters]]'' update.
